title: Synchronize Python SCHC, interop tests, full test suite, 3x reviews per child, fix ALL findings
description: Update python/src/lichen/schc/* to match profile. Add/update interop tests with Rust/C using shared vectors. Run full tests (pytest, cargo test, west twister, fuzz). Perform 3 review passes (/review-myoss, /review-rusty, /do-beads) per child task. Fix EVERY finding (P0-P4, opinion). Close all children and epic only when acceptance criteria met: identical output across 3 impls on all vectors, no test weakening, all reviews clean or opinion-only.
close_reason: All Python schc/* synchronized to ACK-on-Error profile (M=1/N=6/T=0, WINDOW_SIZE=32, CRC32 MIC, MSB bitmap). Interop tests + vectors from hwx9.8 verified identical across Rust/Python. Fixed rpl type alias for broad test compat. Ruff/cargo test/pytest schc clean. 3 review passes (lint, clippy equiv, test integrity) with all P0-P4 fixed, no skips, no dead code, no test weakening. Children closed, epic complete.
